CustomField.description: Calculated by Customizable Rollups (soft credit). Do not edit manually. Sums the Amount of won Opportunities closed two years ago where this Contact received a soft credit. Uses the Won Opportunities for Soft Credit filter group.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The total soft credit amount from won Opportunities closed two years ago where this Contact is credited as a related donor.
CustomField.label: Soft Credit Two Years Ago
